invariant_convertToAssets_roundsDown().details: With decimal offset, conversion math ensures no free value creation

invariant_convertToShares_roundsDown().details: With decimal offset, shares = assets * (totalSupply + offset) / (totalAssets + 1)      This means for small assets, shares can be > assets due to decimal scaling

invariant_totalAssets_bounded().details: Accounts for rounding by allowing totalAssets to be slightly less

invariant_convertToAssets_roundsDown().notice: convertToAssets should round down (no free assets)

invariant_convertToShares_roundsDown().notice: convertToShares should round down (no free shares)

invariant_sumShares_equals_totalSupply().notice: Sum of all actor share balances should equal totalSupply

invariant_totalAssets_bounded().notice: totalAssets should never exceed sum of deposits minus withdrawals

invariant_totalSupply_nonNegative().notice: totalSupply should be non-negative (always true for uint, but explicit)

invariant_vaultBalance_equals_totalAsset.notice: Vault asset balance should match totalAssets
